title: Discovery
subtitle: Day 1–2
description: I get into your goals, constraints, and what success looks like. Clear scope, realistic timeline, no surprises later.

title: Design
subtitle: Day 2–5
description: Wireframes and design system locked in before a single line of code. You see exactly what you're getting.

title: Build
subtitle: Week 1–3
description: Clean, scalable code. Lighthouse 90+ is non-negotiable. 60fps animations, mobile-first, TypeScript throughout.

title: Launch
subtitle: Week 3–4
description: Deployed to production with performance verified, SEO in place, and zero broken flows. You ship with confidence.

title: Support
subtitle: Post-launch
description: 30–90 days of included support depending on tier. Need more? Retainer available for ongoing iteration.
